structured_content.response:
Process J09B has been fully executed according to the defined rules:

- Temporary working tables were created and later deleted.
- ENTSCHEIDUNG was set using all specified business rules (KSA/EVU, special house number and location rules, MANDATORY_READING, DIRECT_MAIL).
- Net and sales master data were compared; sales data was preferred where available, otherwise net data used.
- Three CSV files were generated:
  - `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (748 rows) – sent to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` (3998 rows) – uploaded to the bulk mail service (3998 emails sent).
  - `J09B.csv` (12,789 rows) – remaining cases, sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`.

If you’d like, I can show you the exact SQL used or sample rows from any of these result sets.

kwargs.content:
Process `J09B` has been executed successfully according to its defined rules. Summary of what was done:

- Temporary working tables were created and then cleaned up.
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was determined using the configured business rules:
  - KSA/EVU logic  
  - Special house number and location rules  
  - `MANDATORY_READING` criteria  
  - `DIRECT_MAIL` criteria
- Net and sales master data were compared:
  - Sales data was used where available.
  - Otherwise, net data was used.

Generated outputs:

1. `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` – 748 rows  
   - Sent to: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`

2. `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` – 3,998 rows  
   - Uploaded to the bulk mail service (3,998 emails sent)

3. `J09B.csv` – 12,789 rows  
   - Sent to: `meter.readings@evu.com`

If you tell me what you need next (for example: “show me the decision logic,” “give me sample rows from `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`,” or “explain the KSA/EVU rule”), I can provide details.
